description_long: This object is a classic rifle with a dark wooden stock and a metallic barrel, receiver, and trigger assembly. The stock is robust and fixed, extending smoothly into the receiver, which houses the bolt and firing mechanism. The barrel is long and slender, ending in a simple muzzle with no visible attachments. The trigger guard and trigger are clearly defined beneath the receiver, and the rifle features basic iron sights mounted on top. The overall design is utilitarian, with a matte finish on the metal parts and a slightly textured wood grain on the stock, typical of traditional hunting or military rifles.
description: A traditional rifle with a dark wooden stock, metallic barrel, and basic iron sights, featuring a fixed, robust design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the wooden stock, metallic receiver, and barrel.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow profile of the barrel and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the stock, receiver, and barrel, mirroring the first side but with subtle differences in the wood grain.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the stock and the straight alignment of the barrel.
